name: Disc Cube
short_description: 16mm cube-dicing grid disc for Skymsen continuous-feed vegetable processors, working with a matching slicing disc to cut uniform 16×16mm cubes for salsas, stews and soups.
description:
The Skymsen GC16 is a cube-dicing grid disc for Skymsen's continuous-feed vegetable processors, cutting produce into uniform 16 × 16 mm cubes.

Like other cube grids in the range, the GC16 is a cross-hatched grid rather than a stand-alone blade: fitted behind a slicing disc of matching thickness, the slicer cuts even slices which the grid then divides into cubes as they pass through, producing a consistent dice in a single pass. It suits potatoes, carrots, onions, peppers and other firm vegetables destined for salsas, stews, salads and soups.

Key Features

  • 16 mm (5/8") square cube grid
  • Works together with a matching slicing disc to produce a finished dice
  • Compact grid, approximately 210 × 220 × 12 mm, net weight around 0.51 kg
  • Tool-free fitting and removal for washdown between tasks

name: Disc Z8
short_description: 8mm grating disc for the Skymsen PA-7 vegetable processor, for coarse grating of cheese, carrots, courgettes and beetroot at volume.
description:
The Skymsen Z8 is an 8 mm grating disc for the PA-7 family of continuous-feed vegetable processors, producing a coarse shred suited to hard cheese, carrots, courgettes, beetroot and cucumber.

It fits the same disc chamber as the rest of the PA-7 accessory range, so kitchens can swap it in for grating jobs and back out for slicing or julienne work on the same machine, keeping continuous prep moving through service without a second appliance.

Key Features

  • 8 mm grating cut
  • Fits the PA-7's 203 mm disc mount
  • Net weight approximately 0.70 kg
  • Suits cheese, carrots, courgettes, beetroot and similar firm produce
  • Tool-free fitting for fast changeovers and washdown

The cutting edge is stainless steel on an aluminium disc body, with a non-stick coating to help thick, moist slices release cleanly.

name: Vegetable Processor PA7
short_description: Continuous-feed vegetable processor supplied with a seven-disc set, slicing, grating and julienne-cutting up to 250 kg of produce an hour through two feed mouths.
description:
The Skymsen PA-7 is the workhorse vegetable preparation machine for restaurants, hotels, institutional kitchens and catering operations that need consistent, standardised cuts at volume.

A 0.5 HP motor drives a 203 mm disc at 440 rpm, processing up to 250 kg of produce per hour - the equivalent of several prep cooks, without the variability. The seven-disc set covers slicing at 1 mm and 3 mm, grating at 3, 5 and 8 mm, a fine grater for chocolate and coconut, and a 7×7 mm julienne disc for chips and salads.

Two independent feed mouths make it genuinely ergonomic: the extra-wide oblong mouth swallows cabbages, potatoes and cheese blocks, while the round mouth with pusher handles cylindrical items like carrots and chorizo cleanly. A safety interlock prevents operation unless the lid and arm are closed, and discs change without tools for washdown between tasks.

Key Features

  • Seven-disc set included: slicers 1 and 3 mm, graters 3, 5 and 8 mm, fine grater, 7×7 mm julienne
  • 203 mm disc diameter turning at 440 rpm
  • Output up to approximately 250 kg per hour
  • Two feed mouths: extra-wide oblong for bulk, round with pusher for cylindrical produce
  • Stainless steel and aluminium construction
  • Safety interlock - motor will not start unless lid and arm are closed
  • Tool-free disc changes and easy assembly for cleaning

name: Combination Processor R301
short_description: Compact table-top combination food processor pairing a 3.7 L cutter bowl with a continuous-feed vegetable slicer, so one 650 W machine chops, emulsifies, kneads, slices, grates and juliennes.
description:
The Robot Coupe R 301 is a compact table-top combination processor that puts two commercial machines in one footprint: a 3.7-litre cutter bowl for chopping, mincing, emulsifying, kneading and grinding, and a continuous-feed vegetable preparation attachment for slicing, grating, ripple cutting and julienne.

Built in France around a quiet, direct-drive induction motor running at 1,500 rpm, it is engineered for daily service in restaurants, caterers, hotels and institutions. In cutter mode, the exclusive bowl-base twin smooth-blade assembly delivers a perfectly even consistency on small and large batches alike - up to 1.5 kg of minced meat in two minutes - and the easy-fit lid lets you add liquid or dry ingredients while the machine is running, ideal for sauces and emulsions.

Swap to the vegetable preparation head and two feed openings take over: a 1.6-litre half-moon hopper swallows bulky produce like cabbage, onions and tomatoes, while the 58 mm cylindrical hopper guides long vegetables such as carrots and cucumbers for precise, uniform cuts - up to 4 kg of grated carrot per minute, ejected continuously to the side.

Key Features

  • Two machines in one: 3.7 L cutter plus continuous-feed vegetable slicer
  • 650 W single-phase commercial induction motor, direct drive, 1,500 rpm with pulse
  • Exclusive bowl-base twin smooth-blade assembly for an even consistency
  • Large 1.6 L half-moon hopper plus a 58 mm cylindrical hopper for precision cuts
  • Magnetic safety system, motor brake and lever-operated automatic restart
  • Range of 24 optional precision stainless steel discs, plus serrated blades and juice or citrus attachments
  • Made in France; suited to restaurants and caterers serving up to about 100 covers
meta_description: Robot Coupe R301 combination food processor: 3.7 L cutter plus continuous-feed veg slicer with 24 optional discs. French-built prep power for commercial kitchens in Kenya.

name: Potato Smasher on Stand
short_description: Manual lever-operated chip and vegetable cutter on a welded steel tripod stand, cutting uniform 10 mm chips with no motor and no power supply.
description:
This manual chip and vegetable cutter is built for kitchens that want consistent french fries and vegetable cuts without the cost or power draw of an electric processor.

A long lever drives the produce through a stainless steel blade grid in a single stroke, producing uniform pieces far faster than knife work and with none of the variability. The body, handle and rocker are cast aluminium on a welded steel tube tripod, so the machine is stable in use and effectively indestructible in normal service.

The standard grid is 10 × 10 mm - the classic chip size - with 8 mm and 12 mm grids available separately. Because the blade grids are interchangeable, a single cutter can serve several cut specifications. With no motor and no electrical connection, it needs nothing but floor space, making it a practical fit for kitchens where power is unreliable.

Key Features

  • Fully manual lever operation - no motor, no power supply required
  • Standard 10 × 10 mm stainless steel blade grid
  • Interchangeable grids also available in 8 mm and 12 mm (sold separately)
  • Cast aluminium body, handle and rocker arm
  • Welded tripod stand in steel tube
  • Cuts potato chips, vegetables and fruit into standardised pieces

name: Potato Peeler 25KG Skymsen
short_description: Heavy-duty stainless steel potato peeler taking 25 kg per cycle and up to 500 kg an hour, with a peel strainer box, discharge door and integrated timer.
description:
The Skymsen DB-25HD is the heavy-duty end of the range, engineered for high-volume institutional kitchens, hotels, hospitals, chip processors and large catering operations.

It takes a full 25 kg charge per cycle and delivers up to 500 kg of peeled product per hour, driven by a 1 HP motor turning a durable removable abrasive disc. Water runs continuously through the drum during peeling, so potatoes and tubers emerge peeled and washed together.

A reinforced stainless steel structure carries the load of continuous daily service, and thoughtful details make it practical to live with: an integrated peel strainer box catches peelings before they reach your drain, an exit door empties the drum without wrestling the machine, and a timer keeps every batch consistent. Raised 200 mm on anti-slip rubber-shod feet, it sits at a comfortable working height and washes down easily underneath.

Key Features

  • 25 kg per cycle, output up to 500 kg per hour
  • Reinforced stainless steel structure throughout
  • Removable aluminium-oxide abrasive disc peels and washes in one pass
  • Peel strainer box separates peelings from wastewater, preventing drain blockage
  • Discharge door for fast, safe unloading of a full batch
  • Integrated timer for repeatable cycles
  • Lid safety sensor and anti-restart protection after a power interruption
  • Metal feet 200 mm high with anti-slip rubber

name: Potato Peeler with Door, Stainless Steel 10KG
short_description: Compact stainless steel potato peeler handling 10 kg in about two minutes, with a discharge door, integrated timer and removable abrasive disc.
description:
The Skymsen DB-10 is a compact commercial potato peeler built for kitchens that go through serious volumes of potatoes, cassava, carrots and other tubers.

It handles 10 kg per batch in roughly two minutes - up to 200 kg per hour - replacing hours of hand peeling with a standardised, low-waste result. A rotating abrasive disc coated in aluminium oxide works together with running water to abrade the skin and flush the peelings away, so product comes out peeled and washed in a single operation.

Constructed entirely in stainless steel, the DB-10 is built for hygiene and longevity: the abrasive disc lifts out for cleaning, and a discharge door lets you empty the drum quickly between batches. A built-in timer standardises cycle length so results don't depend on who is operating it, while the lid safety sensor and anti-restart system keep the machine from running when it shouldn't.

Key Features

  • 10 kg per cycle in approximately 2 minutes, up to 200 kg per hour
  • Full stainless steel construction
  • Removable aluminium-oxide abrasive disc peels and washes in one pass
  • Discharge door for fast, safe unloading
  • Integrated timer for repeatable cycles
  • Lid safety sensor prevents running with the lid open
  • Anti-restart protection after an abnormal power interruption

name: Meat Slicer 300
short_description: Semi-automatic gravity slicer built entirely in stainless steel with a 300 mm blade, sized for the constant slicing demands of a deli counter or butchery.
description:
The Skymsen CFI-300L-N is a semi-automatic gravity slicer built entirely from stainless steel and fitted with a 300 mm blade, sized for the constant slicing demands of a deli counter, butchery or hotel kitchen.

The inclined carriage lets product feed under its own weight, so the operator only guides the stroke, and the adjustable thickness dial holds a consistent slice from wafer-thin cured meat to a thicker cut of cheese.

Every part that touches food - blade guard, carriage, deflector - comes off without tools, so the machine can be stripped down and washed at the end of a shift, and an interlock prevents the motor running with the guard removed.

Key Features

  • 300 mm stainless steel blade on an inclined gravity-feed carriage
  • Structure entirely in stainless steel
  • Adjustable thickness control for consistent slices
  • Useful cutting area of 160 × 160 mm
  • Removable blade guard with interlock - will not run with the guard detached
  • Fully removable components for complete sanitisation
  • Suits cheeses, hams, salamis, sausages and cold cuts generally

name: Blender Kitchen SS
short_description: Skymsen LAR tabletop blender with a seamless AISI 304 stainless steel cup, available in 3, 4, 8 and 10 litre sizes, all suited to hot and cold preparations such as soups, creams and sauces.
description:
The Skymsen LAR series is a family of commercial tabletop blenders built around one design in four cup sizes, so a kitchen can pick the batch size it actually works in without changing machine, spares or operator habits.

Every size shares a seamless monobloc AISI 304 stainless steel cup - no welds or seams for residue and bacteria to lodge in, which turns cleaning into a rinse rather than a scrub - and all of them handle hot and cold preparations alike, from chilled sauces to warm soups. A low-energy, high-torque WEG motor drives a hardened cutting unit on reinforced, shielded bearings, and the non-toxic lid carries an overlid feeder so ingredients go in mid-cycle.

Choose the cup to match your service: 3 litres for varied day-to-day prep, 4 litres as the everyday all-rounder, 8 litres for repeated batch work, or 10 litres - the largest tabletop size - for bulk soups, creams and purees. Cups are interchangeable across the range, so a busy kitchen can keep a spare in service and cut downtime.

Key Features

  • Seamless monobloc AISI 304 stainless steel cup in 3, 4, 8 or 10 litres
  • Conical cup geometry for faster vortex formation
  • Hardened cutting unit with reinforced, shielded bearings
  • WEG motor - low energy draw, high torque, long service life
  • Cups interchangeable across the LAR tabletop family
  • Non-toxic lid with overlid feeder for adding ingredients mid-cycle
  • Suitable for both hot and cold preparations
  • Full stainless steel body

name: Blender Kitchen 25 Litres SS
short_description: Floor-standing 25 litre tilting blender with a seamless stainless steel cup and 1.5 HP motor, pouring off directly into pots without lifting or ladling.
description:
The Skymsen LAR-25LMB is the high-volume answer for institutional kitchens, food processors and industrial caterers: a 25-litre seamless stainless steel cup on a full stainless steel stand, driven by a 1.5 HP motor.

Everything that touches food is one-piece stainless with no welds, so hygiene inspection is straightforward and cleaning is fast even in demanding environments.

The defining feature is the tilting cup. At 25 litres, decanting by lifting is neither practical nor safe - instead the cup pivots and pours directly into your receiving vessel. A double stainless steel sealing shaft running on bearings gives long service life under continuous load, and the non-toxic rubber lid carries an overlid feeder for safe ingredient addition during use.

Key Features

  • 25 litre seamless stainless steel cup, the largest in the Skymsen blender range
  • Tilting cup pours off directly - no lifting or ladling
  • Full stainless steel floor stand and cup
  • Double stainless steel sealing shaft with bearings for long service life
  • 1.5 HP motor
  • Non-toxic rubber lid with overlid feeder
  • Suits large-batch sauces, creams, batters, mayonnaise and soups

name: Blender Bar 2 Litres Skymsen
short_description: High-speed bar blender with a 2 litre BPA-free Tritan cup, six-edge stainless blade and variable speed control, crushing ice and frozen pulps on demand.
description:
The Skymsen BM2 Maxi Blender is a high-speed machine engineered for both cold and hot recipes.

A powerful motor spinning to 38,000 rpm crushes ice and liquefies frozen fruit pulp on demand, making it a natural fit for juice bars, cafés, hotel breakfast stations and smoothie counters - and it will just as readily grind coffee beans and nuts or turn out soups and baby food.

The 2-litre cup is moulded from Tritan, a BPA-free copolyester that resists falls and impacts and imparts no taste or odour to what you blend. Inside it sits a six-edge stainless steel blade assembly running on double-shielded bearings. Three controls sit on the black piano-finish base: an on/off button, a pulse trigger for short bursts, and a variable speed controller for everything from a coarse chop to a silk-smooth puree.

Key Features

  • 2 litre BPA-free Tritan cup - impact resistant, taste and odour neutral
  • Six-edge stainless steel blade on double-shielded stainless bearings
  • Variable speed control plus a dedicated pulse trigger
  • Crushes ice and liquefies frozen pulps
  • Handles juices, smoothies, shakes, soups, baby food, coffee beans and nuts
  • Black piano finish body
  • 220-240 V / 50-60 Hz - runs directly on Kenyan mains

name: Hand Immersion Blender 350W H-Kitchen
short_description: Versatile 350W hand immersion blender by H-Kitchen. Professional stick blender for soups, sauces, and purées in commercial Kenyan kitchens.
description:
The Immersion Hand Blender is a kitchen essential designed for effortless blending, pureeing, and mixing.

This handheld blender boasts a 500-watt motor making it a must-have tool for various blending and mixing tasks.

With its sleek and ergonomic design, these handheld appliance offers the convenience of easy operation directly in pots, pitchers, or bowls, eliminating the need for transferring ingredients to a separate blender.

To be paired with our small but powerful motors*, it effortlessly tackles various culinary tasks, from smoothies, soups, and sauces to creamy dips and whipped toppings.

Its compact size and detachable parts make cleaning a breeze, while the intuitive controls ensure precise blending at different speeds for the perfect texture every time.

Ideal for professional chefs and home cooks, the immersion blender is the go-to tool for achieving smooth and consistent results with minimal effort.

name: Immersion Blender CMP 400 VV
short_description: Variable-speed commercial immersion blender with a 420 W motor and 400 mm stainless steel tube, blending and emulsifying batches of up to 73 litres directly in the pot.
description:
The Robot Coupe CMP 400 V.V. is a compact, variable-speed commercial stick blender built for the daily demands of restaurant and café kitchens. Driven by a high-efficiency 420 W motor with self-regulating variable speed from 2,300 to 9,600 rpm, it mixes, blends and emulsifies soups, sauces, purées and creams directly in the pot - handling batches of up to 73 litres. The speed self-regulation keeps the blade turning at a constant rate as the load changes, for smooth, consistent results from the first litre to the last.

Durability is engineered in throughout: the 400 mm tube, bell, blade and motor cover are all stainless steel, and Robot Coupe’s exclusive patented system lets you remove the bell and blade in seconds for thorough, hygienic cleaning. The patented EasyPlug detachable power cord - with an illuminated voltage indicator that confirms the cable is sound and correctly connected - can be swapped in moments without calling a technician.

At around 4 kg, with an ergonomic handle and a clever lug that rests and pivots on the rim of the pan, it stays comfortable and safe to control even over deep stockpots. A stainless steel wall support and blade tool are included as standard.

Key Features

  • 420 W high-efficiency motor; maximum batch capacity 73 litres
  • Variable, self-regulating speed from 2,300 to 9,600 rpm
  • All-stainless-steel 400 mm tube, bell, blade and motor cover
  • Patented removable bell and blade for fast, hygienic cleaning
  • Patented EasyPlug detachable power cord with illuminated voltage indicator
  • Ergonomic handle with pan-rim rest lug; two-button safety start and thermal overload protection
  • Stainless steel wall support and blade tool included; made in France

With a 350 W motor and a 300 mm stainless steel tube, it blends, mixes and emulsifies batches of up to 30 litres directly in the pot - from velvety soups and sauces to purées and emulsions - for a fine-textured, perfectly homogenous finish.

Its variable, self-regulating speed system (2,300 to 9,600 rpm) keeps the blade speed constant regardless of the load, so results stay consistent from the first litre to the last. The ergonomic handle places the variable-speed control right under the operator’s finger, while a lug on the foot lets the machine rest on the pan rim between tasks. The foot, bell, blade and motor cover are all stainless steel for durability and food safety.

Hygiene and serviceability set the CMP range apart: Robot Coupe’s patented system lets the bell and blade be removed in seconds for thorough cleaning, and the patented EasyPlug detachable power cord - with an illuminated voltage indicator that confirms the cable is sound and correctly connected - can be swapped in moments without a technician. name: Juice Extractor Centrifugal Skymsen CSE
short_description: Continuous-feed centrifugal juice extractor with a stainless steel sieve and chamber, ejecting pulp to one side while juice pours from the other so service never stops.
description:
The Skymsen CSE is a commercial continuous-feed centrifugal juicer built for juice bars, hotels, cafeterias and health-food counters that need volume without babysitting the machine.

Because pulp is expelled into a separate collector while juice pours from the spout, the operator can keep loading fruit through the extra-wide mouthpiece instead of stopping to strip out waste. It handles apples, carrots, beets, cucumbers, pineapple, oranges, kale and ginger, extracting juice without crushing the seeds.

Construction is what carries it through daily commercial use: a stainless steel cabinet, liquid chamber and sieve over a die-cast aluminium chamber that absorbs the vibration of a 3,500 rpm basket. A safety micro-switch prevents the motor running unless the unit is correctly assembled, and every contact part comes apart for washdown.

Key Features

  • Continuous operation: juice out one side, pulp ejected the other
  • Extra-wide feed mouthpiece (approx. 73 mm) takes large pieces with minimal prep
  • Stainless steel cabinet, liquid chamber and sieve; die-cast aluminium chamber
  • 0.5 HP motor spinning the basket at 3,500 rpm
  • Safety micro-switch prevents operation when incorrectly assembled
  • Anti-skid feet for wet counters; removable parts for cleaning
  • Leftover pulp can be reused in breads, cakes and jellies

name: Juice Extractor ESB Super N
short_description: Heavy-duty commercial citrus press with a 0.5 HP motor and two interchangeable cones, squeezing around eight oranges, lemons or limes a minute into a stainless steel chamber.
description:
The Skymsen ESB SUPER-N is a heavy-duty commercial citrus press for operations where fresh orange or lemon juice is a daily service item rather than an occasional order.

A 0.5 HP motor turns the cone at up to 1,750 rpm and gets through roughly eight fruits a minute, squeezing to maximum yield while the sieve holds back pith and pips - enough throughput for a breakfast service or a busy juice counter.

Both the housing and the liquids chamber are stainless steel, which matters for a machine in permanent contact with citrus acid, and every part that touches juice lifts out for washing. Two interchangeable cones cover the full citrus range from limes to large oranges, and a no-auto-restart safety circuit means the machine will not spring back to life on its own when power returns after an outage.

Key Features

  • Reciprocating-cone citrus juicer for oranges, lemons, limes and grapefruit
  • 0.5 HP motor producing approximately 8 fruits per minute
  • Stainless steel housing and stainless steel liquids chamber
  • Two cones supplied: large crown for oranges, small crown for lemons
  • Fully removable lid, chamber, sieve, cup and cones for fast cleaning
  • Safety system prevents automatic restart after a power cut
  • Suits bakeries, cafés, snack bars, restaurants, hospitals and canteens

name: Milk Shake Mixer Single Skymsen
short_description: Single-spindle drink mixer running at 15,000 rpm that blends milkshakes straight in the serving cup, supplied with a 0.8 L stainless steel cup and a cast iron base.
description:
The Skymsen BMS-N is a single-spindle commercial milkshake mixer designed around one practical idea: you mix in the cup you serve in.

Its spindle is made from a material that will not chew up a plastic cup, so an operator can blend straight into the takeaway cup and hand it over - no decanting, no second vessel to wash. A stainless steel 0.8 L cup is included for those who prefer the classic soda-fountain method.

At 15,000 rpm with a propeller shaped specifically for ice cream and cold milk, it produces the thick, aerated texture milkshakes are judged on, and it handles iced coffee and cold blended drinks equally well. The cast iron base keeps the machine planted through a full shift, and a safety interlock stops the motor unless the cup is properly seated. At just 210 mm wide it takes almost no counter space.

Key Features

  • Blends directly in the serving cup - spindle will not damage plastic cups
  • 15,000 rpm with a propeller profiled for ice cream and cold milk
  • 0.8 L stainless steel cup included; works with any cup type
  • Cast iron base for stability, stainless steel column
  • Safety interlock: will not run unless the cup is seated in its support
  • Removable parts for cleaning; built to NR-12 and INMETRO safety standards
  • Compact 210 mm footprint

name: Milk Shake Mixer Triple Skymsen
short_description: Triple-spindle drink mixer with three independent motors and three 0.8 L stainless steel cups, blending three milkshakes at once in a 460 mm footprint.
description:
The Skymsen BMS-3-N is the three-spindle version of the BMS line, built for ice cream parlours and fast-food counters where milkshakes come in rushes rather than one at a time.

Each of the three stations has its own independent motor, so an operator can start a shake, leave it running, and begin the next two without any of them sharing power or waiting on each other - throughput roughly triples without tripling the counter space, since the whole unit is 460 mm wide.

It keeps everything that makes the single-spindle model practical: 15,000 rpm spindles with a propeller shaped for ice cream and cold milk, three 0.8 L stainless steel cups included, and spindles made from a material safe to run inside a plastic takeaway cup so drinks can be blended in the vessel they are served in.

  • Blends directly in the serving cup - spindles will not damage plastic cups

  • Three stations in a 460 mm wide footprint

name: Upright Glass Door Chiller Single 8007 DGD
short_description: Single glass-door upright chiller holding 700 litres at 0 to +10 degrees Celsius, with LED interior lighting and ventilated cooling for GN 2/1 storage.
description:
The Tecnodom Eko 700 PV is the display-facing member of Tecnodom's economy upright range: the same 710 mm footprint and GN 2/1 interior as the solid-door cabinets, but with a full-height glass door and an interior LED strip so stock reads at a glance.

It suits front-of-house beverage merchandising, deli and pastry display, and any back-of-house position where staff need to find product without opening the door.

Ventilated cooling holds an even 0 to +10 °C across all shelf levels, and the tropicalised condensing unit is rated for high ambient conditions - the point that matters most for Kenyan kitchens.

Key Features

  • 700 litre capacity with full-height glass door and LED interior lighting
  • Ventilated (forced-air) refrigeration for even temperature at every shelf level
  • AISI 304 stainless steel interior and exterior; galvanised steel base, top and back
  • 60 mm CFC-free injected polyurethane insulation; 60 mm door
  • Self-closing reversible door with magnetic gasket
  • Front electronic control panel with NTC probe
  • Removable monobloc tropicalised refrigeration unit for easy servicing
  • Automatic defrost and condensate evaporation
  • Height-adjustable stainless steel feet (110-190 mm)

name: Blast Chiller 5 Trays DGD
short_description: Five-tray blast chiller taking 20 kg per chilling cycle and 12 kg per freezing cycle, with core and chamber probes supplied and cycles down to -40 degrees Celsius.
description:
Blast chilling is the single biggest lever a professional kitchen has over food safety and food cost, and the Tecnodom ALADINO brings it within reach of a mid-sized operation.

Driving cooked food through the danger band in roughly an hour rather than leaving it to cool in ambient air arrests bacterial growth, holds moisture in the product, and lets a kitchen cook in planned batches instead of scrambling to order. Five levels of GN 1/1 or 600 × 400 mm capacity suit a busy restaurant, hotel breakfast operation, patisserie or butchery without demanding the floor space of a roll-in cabinet.

Both a chamber probe and a core probe ship in the box, so cycles can terminate on true product core temperature rather than a timer - the difference between a properly stabilised product and a guess. Defrosting is done simply by opening the door, with no heating element to fail or add load.

Key Features

  • Blast chills 20 kg per cycle and shock freezes 12 kg per cycle
  • 5 levels on universal runners taking GN 1/1 or 600 × 400 mm trays interchangeably, 70 mm apart
  • Core needle probe and chamber probe both included as standard
  • Selectable cycles at +3, -18, -35 and -40 °C, run by probe or by time
  • Electronic digital control board; ventilated refrigeration
  • Defrost with the door open - no heaters, no hot gas
  • AISI 304 stainless steel inside and out, rounded internal corners
  • 60 mm CFC-free high-pressure injected polyurethane insulation
  • Self-closing door with magnetic gasket; removable condensate tray
  • Adjustable stainless steel feet

name: Blast Chiller for 10 Trays GN1/1 or 60X40-ABBATT
short_description: Ten-tray blast chiller taking 25 kg per chilling cycle and 22 kg per freezing cycle, chilling 65 to 10 degrees Celsius in 62 minutes on the same 750 mm footprint as the five-tray.
description:
The Tecnodom ALADINO P-ATT10EA doubles capacity to ten GN 1/1 levels while keeping the same 750 mm footprint, making it the natural choice where floor space is fixed but throughput has outgrown a five-tray cabinet.

The factory datasheet publishes real cycle times rather than marketing claims: a full 25 kg load falls from 65 °C to 10 °C in 62 minutes, and a 22 kg load reaches -18 °C in 226 minutes. For a hotel banqueting kitchen, central production unit or busy patisserie, that translates directly into how many services can be prepped ahead in a shift.

Construction is AISI 304 stainless throughout with 60 mm of injected polyurethane, and both chamber and core probes are supplied so cycles terminate on genuine product core temperature. It runs on R290 natural refrigerant with a GWP of 3 and defrosts with the door open - no heating element, no hot-gas circuit. Despite the doubled capacity it remains a single-phase machine.

Key Features

  • Blast chills 25 kg per cycle and shock freezes 22 kg per cycle
  • Published cycle times: 62 minutes chilling, 226 minutes freezing
  • 10 levels of GN 1/1, or 5 at 600 × 400 mm, on universal runners 70 mm apart
  • Core needle probe and chamber probe both included as standard
  • Cycles by probe or by time, reaching -40 °C
  • R290 natural refrigerant, GWP 3
  • Defrost with the door open - no heaters, no hot gas
  • AISI 304 stainless steel construction with 60 mm CFC-free insulation
  • Single-phase 230 V supply
meta_description: Tecnodom ALADINO P-ATT10EA blast chiller: 10 trays, 25 kg chill in 62 minutes, R290, core probe. Italian rapid cooling for high-volume kitchens in Kenya.

name: Upright Solid Door Freezer 1 Door DGD AF07PKMBT
short_description: Single solid-door upright freezer holding 700 litres gross at -18 to -22 degrees Celsius, with a door-frame heating element and extractable monobloc unit.
description:
The Tecnodom Perfekt 700 BT is the freezer counterpart to the AF07PKMTN chiller and shares its cabinet, footprint and GN 2/1 interior - the two sit side by side as a matched pair in a line-up.

Pulling to -22 °C rather than a nominal -18 °C gives real headroom for hard-frozen protein and ice cream, and holds it through door-opening cycles in a hot kitchen.

The perimeter heating element on the door frame is the detail that separates a professional freezer cabinet from a converted chiller: it stops the gasket freezing to the frame, which is the usual failure point on freezers in humid coastal conditions. The extractable monobloc keeps servicing simple.

Key Features

  • 700 litres gross, 590 litres net, single GN 2/1 compartment
  • Operating range -18 to -22 °C
  • Door-frame heating element prevents gasket icing
  • Ventilated cooling with automatic defrost and condensate evaporation
  • AISI 304 stainless steel interior and exterior; galvanised base, top and back
  • Rounded internal corners for easy cleaning
  • 60 mm CFC-free injected polyurethane insulation; 60 mm door
  • Extractable monobloc tropicalised refrigeration unit
  • Fan cut-out switch on door opening

name: Upright Solid Door Freezer 2 Door DGD AF14PKMBT
short_description: Two-door upright freezer holding 1,400 litres at -18 to -22 degrees Celsius across a single undivided GN 2/1 interior, with a door-frame heating element.
description:
The Tecnodom Perfekt 1400 BT is the largest cabinet in the range - a two-door, 1,400 litre freezer holding -18 to -22 °C across a single undivided GN 2/1 interior.

It is the bulk-storage answer for kitchens that would otherwise run two single-door freezers: one refrigeration circuit, one controller, one service point, and a continuous interior that takes full-depth GN 2/1 on six levels.

Forced-air circulation and the tropicalised condensing unit keep it stable in high-ambient kitchens, and the door-frame heater protects the gaskets through heavy door-cycle service.

Key Features

  • 1,400 litre capacity across a single undivided compartment
  • Operating range -18 to -22 °C
  • Two self-closing reversible doors with magnetic gaskets
  • Door-frame heating element prevents gasket icing
  • Ventilated cooling with automatic defrost and condensate evaporation
  • AISI 304 stainless steel interior and exterior; galvanised base, top and back
  • 60 mm CFC-free injected polyurethane insulation; 60 mm doors
  • Removable monobloc tropicalised refrigeration unit
  • Supplied with 6 GN 2/1 grids (650 × 530 mm)

name: Freezer Counter 2 Doors GN 1/1 Mid Line
short_description: Two-door freezer counter holding 310 litres at -18 to -22 degrees Celsius, with a stainless worktop that doubles as prep surface in a standard kitchen line.
description:
The Tecnodom TF02MIDBT puts genuine freezer storage directly into the working line, so a chef reaches down for frozen product instead of walking to a reach-in.

The full stainless worktop doubles as prep surface, and at 1,420 mm long it drops into a standard 700 mm-deep run. Ventilated cooling holds -18 to -22 °C evenly across both compartments, and the electronic panel with two NTC probes keeps that stable through the door-opening cycles of a live service.

Construction follows Tecnodom's MID Line standard: stainless steel inside and out, rounded internal corners and a flat-bottomed monocoque body that hoses down without traps, over 60 mm of CFC-free injected polyurethane. Self-closing magnetic-gasket doors limit cold loss, defrost and condensate evaporation are fully automatic, and the monobloc refrigeration unit slides out for service.

Key Features

  • 310 litre capacity across two GN 1/1 compartments
  • Operating range -18 to -22 °C with ventilated cooling
  • Stainless steel inside and out, rounded internal corners, flat-bottomed monocoque body
  • 60 mm CFC-free injected polyurethane insulation

  • Fully automatic defrost and condensate evaporation
  • Extractable monobloc condensing unit for servicing in place
  • One GN 1/1 grid supplied per door
  • Adjustable stainless feet; castors and drawer kits available as options

name: Freezer Counter 3 Doors GN 1/1 Mid Line
short_description: Three-door freezer counter holding 460 litres at -18 to -22 degrees Celsius, with heaters on the evaporator, drain and door frame to prevent icing.
description:
The Tecnodom TF03MIDBT extends the MID Line freezer counter to three doors and 460 litres, giving a full prep run its own frozen storage without a separate reach-in.

At 1,870 mm long and 715 mm deep it sits naturally in a standard kitchen line, and the stainless worktop works as prep surface while three independently accessible compartments keep proteins, prepped items and bases separated. Ventilated cooling holds -18 to -22 °C across the full length.

Build quality matches the rest of the MID range: AISI 304 stainless throughout, rounded internal corners, a flat-bottomed monocoque body and 60 mm of injected CFC-free polyurethane. Doors self-close on magnetic gaskets and open to 105° with self-locking hinges. Heaters on the evaporator, drain and door frame prevent the icing problems that plague negative-temperature counters in humid conditions, and the tropicalised monobloc unit pulls out for service.

  • Operating range -18 to -22 °C with ventilated cooling

name: Multi Deck Display Cooler V6060SL DGD
short_description: Compact open-front display cooler just 680 mm wide, holding +3 to +5 degrees Celsius across four adjustable shelves for cold cuts, dairy and chilled packaged goods.
description:
The Tecnodom VULCANO V6060SL is a compact open-front display refrigerator built for cold cuts, dairy and packaged chilled goods.

At just 680 mm wide it slots into tight runs - end of aisle, a deli back-wall, a forecourt shop - while still presenting four full-width adjustable shelves of merchandise at eye level. Ventilated refrigeration holds a steady +3 to +5 °C across the whole display, and the tempered glass side panel keeps the unit visually open rather than boxing the product in.

Designed and manufactured in Italy, it is a self-contained plug-in unit: it arrives with its condensing unit built in, so installation is a matter of positioning it and connecting a 230 V single-phase supply. Off-cycle defrosting and the standard self-winding night blind keep running costs down.

Key Features

  • 0.85 m² of display surface in a 680 mm wide cabinet
  • 4 height-adjustable shelves with price holders
  • Ventilated refrigeration holding +3 to +5 °C
  • Manual self-winding night blind included as standard
  • Upper white LED lighting
  • Thermoformed 40 mm insulated side walls with tempered glass side panel
  • Off-cycle defrost - no defrost heater
  • Electronic control panel; CFC-free tank
  • Self-contained plug-in unit, ready to use
  • Available in 10 standard RAL colours or stainless steel

The Tecnodom VULCANO VB80250SL is a full-scale, four-door refrigerated merchandiser built for supermarkets, hypermarkets and high-turnover convenience retail.

Its 2,580 mm span and 765 mm depth deliver 5.06 m² of display surface across four adjustable shelves - enough to carry an entire dairy or cold-cuts category in a single run - while the tempered double-glazed hinged doors dramatically reduce the cold-air spill that open multidecks suffer from.

Refrigeration is ventilated and self-contained, holding +3 to +5 °C throughout the cabinet under climate class 3 conditions, which makes it well suited to warm-climate installations. LED lighting across the full width, an electronic control panel, off-cycle defrost and CFC-free construction round out a unit designed to be plugged in and merchandised rather than commissioned.

The double-glazed sliding doors cut cold-air loss sharply compared with an open multideck and - unlike hinged-door cabinets - need no clearance in front, which makes the VS line the practical choice for narrow aisles and tight retail floors.

Insulated 50 mm blind side walls carry integrated LED strips that light the display from both flanks, giving even, shadow-free illumination across all four stainless shelves. Ventilated refrigeration holds +3 to +5 °C for cold cuts, dairy and chilled packaged goods, and the stainless construction suits hygiene-sensitive and high-traffic environments where a painted finish would not wear well.

name: Pastry Display Four Glass Berjaya
short_description: Four-sided glass display chiller, 78 litres, holding 0 to +12°C. Countertop showcase with internal lighting and three adjustable shelves for cakes and pastries.
description:
A countertop refrigerated display chiller with clear glass on all four sides, built to put cakes, pastries and desserts in full view and turn them into impulse sales.

Internal lighting lifts the product against the silver matt aluminium frame, and the double-layer heated glass stays frost free so the display never clouds over in service. Three removable, adjustable shelves let you set the tier spacing around whatever you are merchandising, and the 0 to +12°C range covers everything from cream-filled patisserie to chocolate work.

Key Features

  • Four sides of clear glass for 360° product visibility
  • 78 litre capacity in a compact countertop footprint
  • Temperature range 0 to +12°C
  • Double-layer heated glass, frost free
  • Internal lighting for display
  • Three removable and adjustable PVC shelves
  • Silver matt aluminium frame
  • Runs on standard 220–240 V / 50 Hz single-phase power
  • Performance tested at 32°C ambient

name: Pastry Display Square 1500 Evok
short_description: Straight-glass serve-over pastry showcase 1,505 mm long, with three individually lit glass shelves and rear sliding doors, holding +2 to +4 degrees Celsius.
description:
The Tecnodom EVOK150V is a 1.5-metre refrigerated patisserie and gastronomy showcase with straight tempered glass on all five sides - the squared-off profile that distinguishes the EVOK line from Tecnodom's curved-glass EVO.

Three height-adjustable glass shelves, each with its own LED strip and topped by a further ceiling LED, present cakes, pastries, desserts, cold cuts and cheeses in a fully lit, fully transparent case that reads well from anywhere in the room.

Ventilated refrigeration holds +2 to +4 °C with optimised air distribution across all three tiers, while double-glazed rear sliding doors on vertical gaskets give staff quick serve-over access without letting the cabinet's internal air escape. Automatic condensate evaporation removes the need for a drain, and the removable lower shelves make daily cleaning quick.

Key Features

  • Tempered double glazing on all five sides for panoramic visibility
  • 3 height-adjustable glass shelves, each individually LED-lit, plus ceiling LED
  • 2.34 m² of display surface
  • Rear double-glazed sliding doors with vertical gaskets for serve-over access
  • Ventilated refrigeration holding +2 to +4 °C
  • Automatic condensate evaporation - no drain connection needed
  • Removable lower shelves for cleaning
  • Electronic control panel
  • Front panel available in 10 standard RAL colours
  • Also available in stainless steel, neutral (unrefrigerated) or heated versions

short_description: 700mm countertop heated display by HDS. Compact professional food warmer for snacks and hot pastries in Kenyan food service operations.
description:
HDS HDSHDN-26 Heated Display Counter Top - 700mm

The HDS HDSHDN-26 is a compact 700mm countertop heated display unit built for food service operations in Kenya that need reliable hot food presentation in a space-saving format. This professional warmer is perfect for small cafes, kiosks, and delis where counter space is limited but a hot food display is essential for sales. The unit keeps a well-curated selection of savoury snacks, pastries, and hot foods at ideal serving temperature throughout the day, minimising waste and maximising customer satisfaction.

Key Features:

  • Compact 700mm Width: Space-saving size for tight counter areas
  • Consistent Heating: Reliable temperature for safe hot food service
  • Glass Display Panels: Product visibility drives customer purchases
  • Countertop Format: Elevates food to eye level at point of sale
  • Easy Staff Access: Quick restocking without disrupting service
  • Energy Efficient: Economical heating for small-capacity unit
  • Easy to Clean: Smooth surfaces simplify daily sanitation
  • HDS Quality: Commercial-grade heating performance
  • Professional Appearance: Neat presentation for retail environments

Perfect For:

Small cafes, food kiosks, bakeries, petrol station shops, school canteens, and compact delis in Kenya. Excellent for displaying and maintaining temperature of samosas, pies, sausage rolls, pastries, fried snacks, and other ready-to-eat hot foods in limited counter space.

name: Heated Display Counter Top 900MM HDS
short_description: 900mm countertop heated food display by HDS. Medium-capacity warm showcase for hot snacks and pastries in Kenyan cafes and delis.
description:
HDS HDSHDN-36 Heated Display Counter Top - 900mm

The HDS HDSHDN-36 is a medium-capacity 900mm countertop heated display offering more product space for Kenya's busier cafes, delis, and food service operations. This professional warmer strikes the perfect balance between display capacity and counter footprint, accommodating a wider variety of hot foods while remaining practical for most service counter configurations. Consistent heating throughout the unit ensures that every product presented remains at safe and appetising serving temperatures from opening until the last sale of the day.

Key Features:

  • Medium 900mm Width: Greater variety without excessive counter space
  • Consistent Heat Distribution: Even temperature across all display levels
  • Glass Display: Full product visibility to maximise impulse sales
  • Countertop Placement: Hot food at eye level for maximum appeal
  • Multiple Shelf Levels: Organise different food types by category
  • Easy Restocking: Staff access for quick product rotation
  • Energy Efficient: Optimised heating reduces operating costs
  • Easy Cleaning: Smooth interior for quick daily sanitation
  • HDS Reliability: Commercial-grade performance for daily service

Perfect For:

Medium-sized cafes, bakeries, supermarket delis, hotel breakfast stations, staff canteens, and food courts in Kenya. Ideal for displaying a varied selection of hot foods including pies, samosas, sausage rolls, mandazis, spring rolls, and savoury pastries throughout service hours.

name: Oven Convection Electric 3 Trays Tecnodom FEM03NE02V
short_description: Ultra-compact benchtop convection oven taking three GN 2/3 trays, just 520 mm deep and running from a standard single-phase socket.
description:
The Tecnodom Nerino is the smallest professional convection oven in the Tecnodom range, built for bars, cafés, snack counters and small delis where counter space is the binding constraint.

At 600 mm wide and just 520 mm deep it sits on a standard worktop and runs off a normal 230 V single-phase socket, drawing only 2.5 kW, yet it is a genuine commercial machine - fully stainless steel inside and out, with rounded chamber corners for fast cleaning and a removable inner door glass.

It takes three GN 2/3 trays or grids at 80 mm spacing, enough for croissants and pastries in the morning, hot snacks and pizza slices through the day, and reheating or finishing prepared dishes at service. Controls are deliberately mechanical - a thermostat dial and a timer - so any staff member can operate it and there is very little to go wrong.

Key Features

  • 3 trays or grids in GN 2/3 format (354 × 325 mm), 80 mm apart
  • Only 520 mm deep - fits a standard 600 mm worktop
  • Single-phase 230 V, 2.5 kW - plugs into a normal socket, no special installation
  • Mechanical controls: thermostat plus timer on a vertical panel
  • Cold-touch double-glazed door with openable inner glass for cleaning
  • Interior lighting
  • Full stainless steel construction with rounded chamber corners
  • No water connection required

name: Oven Convection Electric 4 Trays 435X350 FEMG04NE595V
short_description: Four-tray convection oven with an added top grill element and twin fans, taking 435 x 350 mm trays from a standard single-phase supply.
description:
The Tecnodom Nerone EKO 595 Grill is a compact four-tray convection oven with an added top grill element, which makes it markedly more versatile than a plain convection unit - you can bake, roast and regenerate on convection, then switch to grill or grill-plus-fan to brown, gratinate and finish.

Two independent fan motors circulate air across all four levels, so trays cook evenly without rotating them mid-bake.

It takes four 435 × 350 mm trays or grids at 84 mm pitch and is built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel with a rounded-corner chamber, halogen interior lighting and a cold double-glazed door whose inner pane swings open for cleaning. It runs on single-phase 230 V and needs no water connection, which makes it a straightforward drop-in for restaurants, bakeries, patisseries, delis and hotel back-of-house.

Key Features

  • 4 trays or grids at 435 × 350 mm (also accepts 450 × 325 mm), 84 mm apart
  • Separate top grill element, usable alone or combined with convection
  • Twin fan motors for even heat across all four levels
  • Mechanical controls: thermostat and 60-minute timer
  • Low-emissivity tempered double-glazed cold door with openable inner glass
  • Internal halogen lighting
  • AISI 304 stainless steel inside and out, rounded chamber corners
  • IPX3 water protection rating
  • Single-phase 230 V, no water connection required

name: Oven Convection Electric 4 Trays 600X400 FEM04NEPSV
short_description: Four-tray convection oven taking full 600 x 400 mm pastry trays at 80 mm spacing, running 3.15 kW from a single-phase supply with no plumbing needed.
description:
The Tecnodom Nerone EKO 600 four-tray is the workhorse of the compact convection range, taking four full 600 × 400 mm pastry trays at 80 mm spacing in a shell under 800 mm wide.

It is the natural step up from a domestic or three-tray oven for a bakery, patisserie, deli counter or restaurant that needs real batch capacity without moving to three-phase power - the whole oven draws 3.15 kW from a single-phase 230 V supply and needs no water connection at all.

Controls are electromechanical and deliberately simple: set temperature, set time, cook, with LED indicators showing what the oven is doing. Twin fans give uniform heat across all four levels, the chamber is stainless steel with rounded corners for quick wipe-down, and the door carries double low-emissivity tempered glass with an inner pane that opens for cleaning.

Key Features

  • 4 trays at 600 × 400 mm, 80 mm apart
  • Single-phase 230 V at 3.15 kW - no three-phase supply required
  • Electromechanical controls with LED status indicators
  • Twin fans in a stainless steel fan casing
  • Double-glazed low-emissivity tempered cold door with openable inner glass

name: Oven Convection Turbo Electrical 4 Tray Maxiconv
short_description: Compact countertop turbo convection oven taking four 35 x 35 cm trays, with a digital panel, ceramic-fibre insulation and a double tempered-glass door.
description:
The Skymsen MAXICONV is a compact 4-tray electric turbo convection oven that puts bakery-grade output on a countertop.

A forced-convection turbine circulates heat evenly across four 35 × 35 cm perforated trays - around 48 fifty-gram rolls per cycle - while a ceramic-fibre insulated body keeps the heat in the chamber and out of the kitchen.

The digital panel gives precise temperature control up to 210 °C and a timer with an audible alarm, and the double tempered-glass door lets staff watch the bake without opening it. Two units can be stacked to double output in the same footprint. It bakes cheese bread, savoury pastries, lasagnes, calzones, cakes, puff pastry, croissants and macarons.

Key Features

  • Four perforated 35 × 35 cm trays included, 75 mm apart

  • Double tempered-glass door; removable rack for cleaning
  • Stainless steel construction; stackable up to two units
  • Available with manual steam injection (VP version) or dry heat (SV version)

name: Oven Convection Electric 6 Trays Tecnodom FEM06NEMIDVH2O
short_description: Six-tray convection oven with direct steam injection and reversing fans, taking 600 x 400 mm or GN 1/1 trays. Requires three-phase power and a water connection.
description:
The Tecnodom Nerone MID 6 is where the range becomes a true production oven. It holds six 600 × 400 mm or GN 1/1 trays at 80 mm pitch and adds direct steam injection - water is fed straight into the cooking chamber at a percentage you set, so the same machine bakes crusty bread and viennoiserie, roasts meat without drying it, and steams vegetables and fish. A chamber drain handles the condensate.

Fans reverse direction during cooking, which is what makes six levels bake evenly rather than scorching the back of every tray.

Construction is stainless steel throughout - chamber, racks, roof and fan housing - with rounded corners, halogen interior lighting and a cold low-emissivity double-glazed door. Controls are mechanical, so it stays simple to run in a busy kitchen. Note that installation is more involved than the smaller models: it needs a three-phase 400 V supply plus mains water and a drain.

Key Features

  • 6 trays or grids at 600 × 400 mm or GN 1/1, 80 mm apart
  • Direct steam injection with adjustable water percentage, plus chamber drain
  • Reversing fans for even browning across all six levels
  • Mechanical controls
  • Low-emissivity tempered glass cold door, left-hinged
  • Internal halogen lighting
  • Stainless steel chamber, racks, roof and fan casing with rounded corners
  • IPX3 water protection rating
  • Requires three-phase 400 V supply and a plumbed water inlet and drain

description:
The Skymsen Discovery 10 is a full-production electric turbo convection oven, built for bakeries that need volume without variance.

Ten 60 × 70 cm trays spaced 110 mm apart take roughly 300 to 360 fifty-gram rolls per cycle, and the high-output convection system drives heat evenly to every level so the bottom tray finishes with the top.

The cabinet is stainless steel with ceramic-fibre insulation to hold heat where it belongs, the control panel keeps operation to temperature, time and fan speed, and casters let the oven be rolled clear for cleaning.

  • 10 trays at 60 × 70 cm, 110 mm apart
  • Approximately 300-360 breads (50 g) per cycle
  • 20 kW three-phase heating with forced convection for uniform baking
  • Maximum temperature 230 °C
  • Ceramic-fibre insulation for energy efficiency and a cooler bakery
  • Simple operating panel including fan shutdown control
  • Stainless steel construction

name: Oven Convection 10 Tray Tecnodom FEDL10NEMIDVH2O
short_description: Ten-tray digital convection oven with steam injection, nine stored programmes and a core probe, taking 600 x 400 mm or GN 1/1 trays. Three-phase with a water connection.
description:
The Tecnodom Nerone MID 10 Digital is the largest oven in the MID line and a genuine three-function machine - convection, steam and combination - sized for hotels, institutional kitchens, large restaurants and production bakeries.

Ten 600 × 400 mm or GN 1/1 levels at 80 mm pitch give serious throughput, and reversing fans keep the top and bottom of a full load cooking at the same rate.

The digital control panel uses a double display and stores nine fully customisable programmes, so a recurring menu item is one button rather than a set of dial settings. A core probe is supplied for cooking to internal temperature, and Delta T cooking lets you hold a narrow differential between chamber and core for large joints and slow roasts. Steam injection is set as a percentage, and interior lighting, pre-heat and timing are all programmable. Installation requires a 400 V three-phase supply plus mains water and a drain.

Key Features

  • 10 trays or grids at 600 × 400 mm or GN 1/1, 80 mm apart
  • Direct steam injection with adjustable water percentage, plus chamber drain
  • Digital controls with double display and 9 customisable programmes
  • Core temperature probe included, plus Delta T low-differential cooking
  • Reversing fans for even results across a full load
  • Programmable pre-heat, chamber temperature, cooking time and interior lighting
  • Stainless steel throughout with rounded chamber corners
  • Runners accept trays, grids, gastronorm basins and plates
  • Optional refractory stone kit for bread and pizza
  • Requires three-phase 400 V supply and a plumbed water inlet and drain

name: Cake Mixer Planetary 7 Litres H-Kitchen
short_description: Compact 7-litre planetary cake mixer by HK-Redline. Versatile commercial mixer for cakes, creams, and pastries in Kenya.
description:
HK-REDLINE HK-B7 Planetary Mixer - 7 Litres

The HK-REDLINE HK-B7 is a compact 7-litre planetary mixer ideal for small bakeries, cafes, and pastry operations across Kenya. Unlike spiral mixers designed for dough, planetary mixers use a planet-orbit motion where the attachment rotates on its own axis while simultaneously orbiting the bowl - making them exceptionally versatile for a wide range of baking tasks. From whipping cream and beating eggs to mixing cake batter and light pastry, this compact unit handles it all with ease.

Key Features:

  • 7-Litre Bowl: Compact yet capable for small-batch work
  • Planetary Action: Versatile mixing for cakes, creams, and batters
  • Multiple Attachments: Flat beater, dough hook, and wire whisk
  • Variable Speed: Multiple speeds for different mixing tasks
  • Compact Design: Space-efficient for smaller kitchens
  • HK-Redline Reliability: Commercial-grade motor for daily use
  • Easy Bowl Removal: Quick changeover between tasks
  • Versatile Application: Cakes, creams, icings, pastry, and light doughs
  • Accessible Price: Professional quality at competitive cost

Perfect For:

Small bakeries, pastry kitchens, cafes, hotel restaurants, and catering operations in Kenya. Excellent as a dedicated mixing station for cake batters, buttercreams, mousses, meringues, and light pastry doughs alongside spiral mixers used for bread production.

name: Cake Mixer Planetary 20 Litres Berjaya
short_description: 20-litre planetary mixer with three speeds and a 1,100 W gear-driven motor, handling up to 5 kg of dough. Runs on standard single-phase 240 V power.
description:
A 20 litre floor-standing planetary mixer for bakeries and pastry kitchens - whipping egg and cream, creaming butter, mixing patty, and kneading up to 5 kg of dough.

A 1,100 W motor drives a high-class gear system rather than a belt, which is what keeps it quiet and lets it hold torque in heavy dough without slipping. Three speeds cover the working range, from 197 rpm on the hook for kneading up to 462 rpm on the whisk for aeration. The bowl carries a non-stick internal wall so batter releases cleanly, and the motor is built for heat dissipation through long production runs.

It runs on ordinary 220–240 V single-phase power at 50 Hz, so no three-phase supply is needed - the whole range up to 38 litres stays single-phase.

Key Features

  • 20 litre bowl capacity
  • 1,100 W high-efficiency motor with gear drive, low noise
  • Three-speed control
  • Maximum 5 kg dough capacity (flour pre-mixed with 50% water)
  • Whisk, beater and hook speeds of 462 / 317 / 197 rpm
  • Non-stick internal bowl wall
  • Single-phase 220–240 V / 50 Hz - no three-phase supply required
  • Suitable for egg, butter, patty and dough

name: Wet and Dry Intelligent Built-In Elec Chafing Dish
short_description: Intelligent wet and dry electric chafing dish by Winners. Advanced dual-mode built-in buffet warmer for professional food service in Kenya.
description:
WINNERS QR016 Wet and Dry Intelligent Built-In Electric Chafing Dish

The WINNERS QR016 is an advanced intelligent electric chafing dish offering both wet and dry heating modes for maximum versatility in professional buffet service across Kenya. The wet mode uses water-based heating for moist foods like soups and stews, while the dry mode provides direct heat for foods that must not come into contact with moisture. This dual-mode capability makes the QR016 one of the most versatile chafing dishes available, suitable for virtually any buffet food type with a single unit.

Key Features:

  • Wet and Dry Modes: Versatile heating for any food type
  • Intelligent Controls: Smart mode selection for optimal food holding
  • Built-In Electric: Clean, consistent fuel-free heating
  • Dual Functionality: One unit handles all buffet food categories
  • Precise Temperature: Intelligent system manages heat accurately
  • Professional Grade: Commercial construction for daily use
  • Winners Quality: Reliable advanced buffet equipment
  • Operational Flexibility: Adapt to any menu requirement

Perfect For:

Hotels, catering companies, and professional food service operations in Kenya needing maximum buffet versatility. Ideal for operations serving diverse menus where both wet-heat and dry-heat food holding is required from the same buffet equipment.

name: Bain Marie Table Top H-Kitchen BS-6V
short_description: 6-section tabletop bain marie by HK-Redline. Commercial electric food warmer for buffet and cafeteria service in Kenya.
description:
Stainless Steel Electric 6 Pan Bain Marie. Power: 230V/50HZ / 1/3X6"*6 1.5 kw. Voltage: 220-240V. Net weight: 17kg

A bain marie is a utensil and a cooking technique.

One container with food to be cooked is placed in another larger pan containing water at the simmering point.

This cooking method surrounds the food with very gentle heat and is used for cooking delicate dishes like custards or white sauces or melting chocolates.

name: GN Container 1/3 65 Berjaya
short_description: Third-size 1/3 GN food pan, 65 mm deep, in stainless steel. EN 631 Gastronorm at 325 x 176 mm, for buffet service, prep and cold storage.
description:
A third-size Berjaya stainless steel food pan in 65 mm depth - the everyday portioning pan for buffet lines, salad bars, prep benches and refrigerated storage.

Gastronorm is an international standard (EN 631), so this pan drops into any compliant 1/3 opening - counter, trolley, oven runner or refrigerator shelf - regardless of manufacturer. That interchangeability is what lets a kitchen move food from cold store to service without decanting it.

Key Details

  • 1/3 Gastronorm size - 325 × 176 mm to EN 631
  • 65 mm depth
  • Stainless steel construction, corrosion resistant
  • Smooth surface with large corner and floor radii for easy cleaning
  • Also made in deeper 100, 150 and 205 mm versions
  • Takes a matching Berjaya 1/3 GN cover

name: GN Container Perforated 1/1 65 Bilge
short_description: Perforated full-size 1/1 GN container, 65 mm deep, for steaming, blanching and draining. Stainless steel to the EN 631 Gastronorm standard, 530 x 325 mm.
description:
A perforated full-size Gastronorm container in 65 mm depth. The perforations let steam circulate and liquid drain away, which makes it the pan for steaming vegetables, blanching, washing salad leaves and draining anything that would otherwise sit in its own liquid.

Gastronorm is an international standard (EN 631), which is the point of it: any 1/1 pan fits any 1/1 opening, on any compliant counter, trolley, oven runner or refrigerator shelf, regardless of who made it. That interoperability is what lets a kitchen move food from cold store to oven to service without decanting it.

It nests inside a solid pan of the same size so drained liquid is caught rather than spilled, and it takes the same lid as the solid version.

Key Details

  • 1/1 Gastronorm size - 530 × 325 mm to EN 631
  • 65 mm depth
  • Approximately 9.0 litres capacity
  • Perforated base and sides for steaming and draining
  • Stainless steel, suitable for oven, refrigerator, freezer and bain marie use
  • Stackable, and interchangeable with any EN 631 compliant equipment
  • Takes a standard 1/1 GN lid

A sixth-size Gastronorm container in 100 mm depth, the workhorse pan of a professional kitchen - used for prep, storage, transport, refrigeration, bain marie service and buffet display.

Gastronorm is an international standard (EN 631), which is the point of it: any 1/6 pan fits any 1/6 opening, on any compliant counter, trolley, oven runner or refrigerator shelf, regardless of who made it. That interoperability is what lets a kitchen move food from cold store to oven to service without decanting it.

Key Details

  • 1/6 Gastronorm size - 176 × 162 mm to EN 631
  • 100 mm depth
  • Approximately 1.6 litres capacity
  • Stainless steel, suitable for oven, refrigerator, freezer and bain marie use
  • Stackable, and interchangeable with any EN 631 compliant equipment
  • Takes a standard 1/6 GN lid

name: GN Lids Bilge
short_description: Stainless steel lids for Gastronorm containers to the EN 631 standard, in every standard size from full 1/1 down to 1/9. Each fits any GN container of that size, regardless of depth or manufacturer.
description:
Stainless steel lids for Gastronorm containers, available across the full range of standard GN sizes.

Lids do the unglamorous but important work in a professional kitchen: they hold temperature during transport and holding, keep contamination out in storage, and stop cross-contamination of odours in a busy walk-in.

Because Gastronorm is an international standard (EN 631), a lid fits any GN container of the same size regardless of manufacturer or depth - a 1/1 lid works equally on a 65 mm, 100 mm or 150 mm pan. Choose your size below.

Key Details

  • Stainless steel, to the EN 631 Gastronorm standard
  • Available in 1/1, 1/2, 1/3, 1/4, 1/6 and 1/9 sizes
  • Fits GN containers of any depth
  • Suitable for refrigerated storage, transport and holding

name: Fryer Roller Grill RFG 12
short_description: Roller Grill RFG 12 commercial electric fryer delivering professional high-volume frying performance for fast food restaurants and catering kitchens in Kenya.
description:
The professional gas fryer RFG 12 is particularly suitable for the cooking of fresh and frozen food for take-away.

The filtering basket-holder placed at the bottom of the stainless steel tank has a dual function:

- This filter recovers important residues of frying

- This grid allows to fry without basket large pieces such as donuts or whole fish for "fish and chips" menus

This gas deep fat fryer is equipped with a double ramp of very powerful radiants placed under the stainless steel tank.

The Piezo ignition is made by simply pressing both ignition and adjustment buttons. The pilot light makes it possible to control the arrival of the gas and the good lighting of the fryer. The gas is evacuated by the back pipe.

Maintenance is carried out safely thanks to a stainless steel drain tap.

This modular fryer can be installed on a work surface or mounted on the stainless steel cabinet MS-RFG 12.

Features: Piezo ignition button, thermocouple and pilot light, 2 very powerful burners, draining device, basket, adjustable feet. Stainless steel lid.

name: Heated Water Urn with Concealed Element Berjaya
short_description: Berjaya concealed-element water urn in polished 304 stainless steel, available in 30 and 40 litre sizes - roughly 140 or 190 cups - with a 2,800 W element, thermostat control and brass non-drip faucet.
description:
An electric water urn in polished 304 stainless steel, built around one design in two capacities so a kitchen can match the urn to its service without changing spares or operator habits - 30 litres (about 140 cups) for hotel beverage stations and busy tea service, or 40 litres (about 190 cups) for big buffets, corporate events and institutional catering.

Both sizes share a 2,800 W heating element that is concealed rather than exposed, which keeps it out of contact with the water and makes descaling and cleaning far easier over the life of the urn. A thermostat holds temperature once the water is up, and the all-welded body with brass non-drip faucet is built for continuous commercial use.

Key Features

  • Choice of 30 litre (approx. 140 cups) or 40 litre (approx. 190 cups) capacity
  • Concealed 2,800 W heating element
  • Thermostatically controlled
  • Polished 304 stainless steel, all-welded construction
  • Durable brass non-drip faucet
  • Sight tube and ventilated cover
  • Insulated handles
  • Runs on standard 220–240 V single-phase power

short_description: Crem CQM2 coffee brewer with 2 decanters for double-capacity fresh-brewed coffee service at hotel breakfast stations and high-volume commercial beverage stations in Kenya.
description:
Crem Coffee Brewer with 2 Decanters – CQM2

The Crem CQM2 is a dual-decanter professional coffee brewer that delivers twice the serving capacity of a single-decanter unit - ensuring a continuous supply of fresh-brewed coffee at hotel breakfast buffets, large restaurants, and high-volume beverage service operations across Kenya. With two decanters always available, service staff can replenish one while the other is in active service, eliminating coffee service gaps during busy periods.

Key Features:

  • Dual Decanter System: Two glass decanters provide double capacity and continuous service availability
  • Simultaneous or Sequential Brewing: Brews into one decanter while the other is in service
  • Dual Warming Plates: Keeps both decanters of coffee at optimal serving temperature
  • Precise Brewing Temperature: Consistent extraction for excellent coffee quality in every batch
  • Stainless Steel Professional Body: Durable, hygienic, and presentable for front-of-house service
  • High-Capacity Water System: Handles the water volume needed for continuous dual-decanter brewing
  • Easy-to-Use Controls: Simple operation for consistent results from any catering staff
  • Crem Commercial Reliability: Trusted professional brand for demanding hospitality environments

Perfect For:

Hotels, large restaurants, conference facilities, and high-volume commercial catering operations in Kenya that need continuous, uninterrupted fresh-brewed coffee service during breakfast, events, and throughout busy daily service periods.

name: Thermo Box 6 GN Heated
short_description: HK-Redline CPWK090-31 heated thermo box for 6 GN containers, combining active heating with insulated transport for hot food delivery at large catering events across Kenya.
description:
HK-Redline Heated Thermo Box 6 GN – CPWK090-31

The HK-Redline CPWK090-31 Heated Thermo Box is a large-capacity, actively heated insulated food transport unit accommodating up to 6 standard GN containers. Unlike passive thermo boxes that rely solely on insulation, this model incorporates an active electric heating system that continuously maintains food at correct hot serving temperatures during transport and holding - making it ideal for large off-site catering operations, outdoor events, and banquet service across Kenya where food must arrive genuinely hot.

Key Features:

  • 6 GN Container Capacity: Large volume for transporting a complete hot meal range in a single unit
  • Active Electric Heating: Built-in heating element actively maintains food at hot serving temperature during transport
  • High-Density Insulated Shell: Combined active heating and insulation for superior temperature retention
  • GN Standard Compatible Rails: Internal GN rails securely hold standard GN food pans during transport
  • Temperature Control: Adjustable heating settings for different food holding temperature requirements
  • Secure Locking Lid: Heavy-duty latch prevents lid opening and heat loss during transit
  • Heavy-Duty Outer Casing: Impact-resistant body protects contents during outdoor and vehicle transport
  • Carry Handles and Castors: Multiple carrying options for flexible maneuvering at event venues
  • Food-Safe Hygienic Interior: Easy-to-clean surfaces maintain food safety standards post-service
  • HACCP Compatible: Active heating supports compliance with hot food holding temperature requirements

Perfect For:

Large-scale catering companies, hotel outdoor event operations, school feeding programs, corporate event caterers, and commercial food service businesses in Kenya requiring a high-capacity actively heated thermo box for compliant, large-volume hot food transport and holding at off-site venues, outdoor events, and remote catering assignments.

name: Insect Killer Berjaya IK30

description:
An electric flying-insect killer that draws mosquitoes and flies toward a 15 W ultraviolet tube and kills them on contact with an electrified grid - no glue boards to replace and nothing sprayed near food.

It covers up to 80 m², draws only 40 W, and its slim 105 mm depth lets it sit close to a wall in a service corridor, kitchen, prep area or store. Suited to restaurants, hotels, hospitals, factories and farms, and straightforward to install and wipe out.

Key Features

  • Coverage up to 80 m²
  • 15 W fluorescent ultraviolet tube
  • Electric grid kill - not a glue-board trap
  • Low power draw at 40 W total
  • Slimline 105 mm depth
  • Easy to install and clean
  • Suits restaurants, hotels, hospitals, factories and farms
  • Runs on standard 220–230 V single-phase power

The stainless steel body is built for continuous use in commercial kitchens, food processing areas and healthcare hand-hygiene stations, and wall mounting keeps the floor clear for cleaning.

  • Fixed 15-second water flow per knee press

name: Food Sink Shredder Disposer ED1100
short_description: Sunnylux ED1100 food waste shredder disposer for hygienic, efficient disposal of food waste directly through the sink drain in commercial kitchens across Kenya.
description:
The ED1100 Food Sink Shredder Disposer is a powerful and reliable solution for managing kitchen waste with ease. Built with a 1.5HP (1100W) permanent magnet DC motor, it delivers a high-speed performance of 3200r/min, ensuring efficient and ultra-fine grinding of food scraps.


Featuring the advanced Cyclone™ Ultrafine Grinding System, this disposer breaks down waste quickly while reducing the risk of clogs. Its stainless steel grinding components guarantee durability and long-lasting performance, while the permanent antibacterial protection helps maintain hygiene in your kitchen.


For added safety, the ED1100 is equipped with a manual reset protector to guard against overloads and temperature spikes, providing peace of mind during heavy use.

name: AQ-RO-600 Watermark
short_description: Antunes AQ-RO-600 reverse osmosis system - reliable water purification for professional coffee and beverage equipment in commercial kitchens across East Africa.
description:
Whether you need clean water to effectively operate your water-reliant kitchen equipment, or as a vital ingredient in your food and beverage production, the quality of the water coming out of your tap dramatically impacts your efficiency and final product.

Rather than working around poor water quality, take control of your water by installing a commercial reverse osmosis system in your food service operation.

When you get this system installed, you will have high-quality water all year long for your patrons.

You and your guest will appreciate the high water quality that you offer because everything will taste more delicious than it did before.

name: Hrs Hardness Reduction System
short_description: Antunes hardness reduction system - essential water treatment for extending the lifespan of commercial coffee machines in East Africa's high-mineral water environments.
description:
The HRS – Hardness Reduction System is engineered to protect your equipment and enhance beverage quality by preventing lime scale buildup. Using a reliable five-step process, the system effectively removes scale-forming ions, ensuring long-lasting protection for your machines.


By minimizing lime scale deposits, the HRS system not only improves the taste and consistency of beverages but also reduces maintenance frequency and costs. Perfect for commercial kitchens, cafes, and beverage service equipment, this solution ensures optimal performance and extended equipment lifespan.

• Hardness Reduction System

  • 39 - 86° F operating temperature range
  • 4528 gallon capacity
  • 0.5 gpm
  • 5-step process to remove scale-forming ions
  • lime scale buildup inhibitor
  • System includes flush valve, carbonate hardness kit, and fittings to allow 1/2" ID hose and/or 3/8" OD tubing

name: Ultrafiltration System VZN-511V
short_description: Antunes VZN-511V ultrafiltration system - premium water purification for professional coffee equipment ensuring consistently high-quality brewing results across East Africa.
description:
The Antunes VZN-511V vertical vision water filtration system is self-cleaning and has mechanical filtration in addition to taste and odor reduction, ensuring long performance life with one yearly carbon cartridge change. This low-maintenance system captures and removes particles as small as 0.015 microns to provide fresh, untainted water. Because it enables beneficial minerals to remain, this system delivers optimal flavor for ice water and water-based beverages such as coffee, tea, and lemonade.

Product Details

  • Ensures reliably fresh-tasting water for consistent product
  • Vertical design streamlines installation
  • 0.015-micron particles are removed with this system
  • Self-cleaning filter performs with minimal intervention
  • Extends equipment life by reducing limescale buildup and mineral stains
  • Processes 5.2 GPM
  • Overall Dimensions: 622 mm W x 254 mm D x 610 mm H

The RATIONAL Chicken Super Spike is a vertical roasting rack that holds whole chickens upright inside a combi oven, creating a chimney effect that speeds up cooking.

Standing the birds rather than laying them flat gives commercial kitchens faster, more consistent results across a batch, with juicy breast meat and uniformly browned skin. Both sizes share the same 1/1 GN footprint and trade bird size against bird count: 8 birds at up to 2.9 lbs each, or 10 birds at up to 2 lbs each.

Key Features

  • Vertical “chimney effect” design shortens cooking time
  • Promotes juicy breast meat and uniformly browned skin
  • Fits a 1/1 GN cavity (12 3/4" x 20 7/8")
  • Available holding 8 birds (up to 2.9 lbs each) or 10 birds (up to 2 lbs each)
  • Compatible with RATIONAL iHexagon combi ovens

name: Taski Aero 8 UK
short_description: Compact 13 litre tub vacuum running at 53 dB(A), with a 585 W motor engineered to match the pick-up of a conventional 900 W machine.
description:
The TASKI AERO 8 is a compact professional tub vacuum built around Diversey's patented whisper technology, running at just 53 dB(A) - quiet enough to work through occupied offices, hotel corridors, classrooms and wards without disturbing anyone. That makes daytime cleaning genuinely practical, removing the cost premium of night shifts.

Its headline engineering is efficiency: a 585 W motor matches the pick-up of conventional 900 W machines through a redesigned airflow path, cutting energy draw by roughly a third.

The Series II build adds reinforced wheels, hood cover, moulding joints and cabling, with a metal telescopic tube, metal elbow and hose connector. Cables and filters are user-replaceable in seconds without tools, keeping the machine in service with minimal downtime.

Key Features

  • 13 litre canister taking fleece or paper bags
  • Patented whisper technology - 53 dB(A) sound pressure
  • 585 W motor with the cleaning performance of a 900 W vacuum
  • Three-stage filtration; HEPA available as an option
  • Tool-free replacement of cables and filters
  • 16 m working radius (12.5 m cable plus 2.2 m hose)
  • Metal telescopic tube, elbow and hose connector
  • Integrated carry handle doubling as a cable tidy
  • 6.4 kg with cable; protection class II
